<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  module type Cache_sig =
    sig
      type key
      type value
      val has : Request_cache.Cache_sig.key -> bool
      val set :
        Request_cache.Cache_sig.key -> Request_cache.Cache_sig.value -> unit
      val reset : Request_cache.Cache_sig.key -> unit
      val get :
        Request_cache.Cache_sig.key -> Request_cache.Cache_sig.value Lwt.t
    end
  module Make :
    (M : sig
           type key
           type value
           val compare :
             Request_cache.Make.key -> Request_cache.Make.key -> int
           val get : Request_cache.Make.key -> Request_cache.Make.value Lwt.t
         end)
      ->
      sig
        type key = M.key
        type value = M.value
        val has : key -> bool
        val set : key -> value -> unit
        val reset : key -> unit
        val get : key -> value Lwt.t
      end
end >>
